name: content
description: The full prose body of a spec record in markdown. May contain normative statements (MUST/SHOULD/MAY), explanations, non-normative notes, code blocks, and tables.

aiGuidance.purpose: The full prose body of a spec record in markdown. May contain normative statements (MUST/SHOULD/MAY), explanations, non-normative notes, code blocks, and tables.
aiGuidance.extraction: Use RFC 2119 keywords (MUST, SHOULD, MAY, MUST NOT, SHOULD NOT) for normative statements within the body. Non-normative passages do not need special marking. Structure with markdown headings, lists, and code blocks as appropriate.
